children.text: not later than 60 days after , identify the number of Department full-time equivalent employees who worked on or administered each education program or project authorized under this chapter, as such program or project was in effect on the day before , and publish such information on the Department’s website;December 10, 2015December 10, 2015

not later than 60 days after , identify the number of full-time equivalent employees who worked on or administered each program or project authorized under this chapter, as such program or project was in effect on the day before , that has been eliminated or consolidated since ;December 10, 2015December 10, 2015December 10, 2015

children.label: A
children.text: the number of full-time equivalent employees associated with each program or project authorized under this chapter and administered by the Department;

children.label: B
children.text: the number of full-time equivalent employees who were determined to be associated with eliminated or consolidated programs or projects described in paragraph (2);

children.label: C
children.text: how the Secretary has reduced the number of full-time equivalent employees as described in paragraph (3);

children.label: D
children.text: the average salary of the full-time equivalent employees described in subparagraph (B) whose positions were eliminated; and

children.label: E
children.text: the average salary of the full-time equivalent employees who work on or administer a program or project authorized by the Department under this chapter, disaggregated by employee function within each such program or project.
